CustomField.formula: IF( Active_User__c =FALSE, "Not a FIMBY User", IF(LEFT(Household_Account__c,15) = LEFT($User.HouseholdID__c,15) || LEFT($User.ProfileId,15) ="00e5f000002g3Zx", TEXT((Need_Postings_For_Self__c * -1)) + " Need Postings For Self (Receiving)" + BR() + TEXT(Need_Postings_For_Others__c) + " Need Postings For Others (Giving)" + BR() + TEXT(Need_Responses_For_Self__c) + " Need Responses For Self (Giving)" + BR() + TEXT(Need_Responses_For_Others__c) + " Need Responses For Others (Giving)" + BR() + TEXT(Offer_Postings_For_Self__c) + " Offer Postings For Self (Giving)" + BR() + TEXT(Offer_Postings_For_Others__c) + " Offer Postings For Others (Giving)" + BR() + TEXT((Offer_Responses_For_Self__c * -1)) + " Offer Responses For Self (Receiving)" + BR() + TEXT(Offer_Responses_For_Others__c) + " Offer Responses For Others (Giving)", "<Private>"))
CustomField.label: Give and Receive Totals
